Which screens show the animated background.
confluencemenuaddon.configuration.enable: Main Menu Background
Show the animated background on the main menu.
World Select Background
Show the animated background on the world select screen.
Multiplayer Screen Background
Show the animated background on the multiplayer server list.
Options Screen Background
Show the animated background on the options screen.
Create World Background
Show the animated background on the create world screen.
Mods List Background
Show the animated background on the mods list screen.
Config Screen Background
Show the animated background on a mod's configuration screen (opened via the "Config" button on the mods list).
Accessibility Screen Background
Show the animated background on the accessibility settings screen.
Language Screen Background
Show the animated background on the language selection screen.
confluencemenuaddon.configuration.backgr: How fast the background sky, sun, moon, and clouds scroll. 0 keeps it still.
confluencemenuaddon.configuration.enviro: How fast the background scenery scrolls sideways. 0 keeps it still.
Which direction the background scenery scrolls.
confluencemenuaddon.configuration.additi: Other screens to show the background on, listed by their full class name.
confluencemenuaddon.configuration.enable: Easter Egg Title
Clicking the sun or moon on the animated background swaps the main menu's "MINECRAFT" logo to an older version until the game restarts.
Confluence Splash Text
Replace the main menu's splash text with one of Confluence: Otherworld's own randomized window title lines instead of a vanilla Minecraft splash.
